{{Infobox group
| name = Naru
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru]] have admonished the [[Jai clan]] for their actions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru]] took over the empire fifty years ago.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Naru family]] has a [[Path of Grasping Sky]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Naru]] are one of the major clans.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
